title: Hellraiser: Revival launches in October and receives critical acclaim
summary: The new horror game based on Clive Barker's work combines action and survival horror elements, with a release date of October 8.

title: Microsoft considers selling or closing Xbox studios amid restructuring rumors
summary: Several reports indicate that Ninja Theory, Double Fine, and other teams are in negotiations to avoid closure or sale.

title: Nintendo finally updates Switch eShop after years of sluggishness
summary: A new firmware update fixes the speed issue of the digital store, one of the biggest user complaints.

title: Steam Next Fest generates great anticipation with thousands of demos and debate over AI
summary: The June edition of Steam's demo festival attracts players with hundreds of free trials and the revelation that over a thousand games use generative AI.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces June games with notable additions and departures
summary: The subscription service adds EA Sports FC 26 and other titles, while eight games will leave the catalog soon.

title: Luna Abyss studio closes and lays off all employees one month after release
summary: The acclaimed cosmic horror shooter, which came to Game Pass, saw its entire team laid off just weeks after its debut.

title: Take-Two confirms GTA 6 release date and justifies its prolonged development
summary: The company's CEO explains that the game aims for perfection and that the delays will be worth it to meet expectations.

title: Overwatch launches season 3 with Shion, a new hero on a motorcycle
summary: The new season includes a Tokyo map, a battle pass with Ultra skins, and balance changes like the Jetpack Cat nerf.

title: Outward 2 delayed to 2027 less than a month before its planned release
summary: The open-world survival RPG postpones its early access to 2027, disappointing fans who expected its imminent debut.

title: Analysts criticize Gears of War E-Day exclusivity on Xbox and Microsoft defends its decision
summary: While experts predict lower sales for not releasing it on Steam, Xbox assures that the exclusivity is not temporary and that they trust their strategy.

title: Don't Nod, creators of Life is Strange, on the brink of bankruptcy by November
summary: The French developers urgently need to secure funding to avoid running out of cash, according to a financial report.

title: Hackers steal Nintendo employee data and demand $2 million ransom
summary: The Japanese company confirms a security incident in which a group accessed confidential personnel information.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows receives its final update with the true conclusion of the story
summary: Ubisoft releases a free patch that adds the 'true ending' mission and promotional content, over a year after launch.

title: Sega creates a life-size Sonic figure containing the character's DNA in a Chaos Emerald
summary: The Japanese company surprises with a unique collectible piece that includes fictional genetic material of the famous blue hedgehog.

title: Mark Hamill joins the cast of the Twisted Metal series for a key role
summary: The legendary Star Wars actor will play an important character in the second season of the game's television adaptation.

title: Guild Wars 3 promises no pay-to-win or hidden subscriptions like battle passes
summary: ArenaNet defines its business model for the next MMO installment, ensuring it will be fair and without abusive microtransactions.

title: Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles updated with New Game+ and more content
summary: The enhanced version of the tactical game includes new replayability options and general improvements.

title: Sony patents a PS5 controller with buttons that harden based on pressure
summary: The patent describes a technology that adjusts button resistance to offer a more immersive gaming experience.

title: Naoki Hamaguchi explains why Final Fantasy VII Revelation has that subtitle
summary: The game director details that 'Resolve' was the central theme, not 'Revolution', and shows new aspects of the title.

title: Pokémon Champions comes to mobile with guides to choose the best Mega Raichu
summary: The Pokémon battle game is now available, and players can consult strategies to maximize their creatures' potential.
